name: Oyster Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 pints Fresh oysters in their liquor
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the oysters and reserve the liquor. Discard any fragments of shell.
2. In a saucepan over medium heat, melt 4 tablespoons of butter.
3. Sprinkle with celery salt and paprika. When the butter sizzles, add Worcestershire sauce.
4. Add the drained oysters and cook until they are plump and their edges curl, about 1 to 2 minutes.
5. Add the reserved oyster liquor and bring to a boil for about 1 minute.
6. Stir in cream and cook until very hot but not boiling, about 2 to 3 minutes.
7. Divide the remaining butter between two serving bowls.
8. Ladle the stew into bowls and serve immediately.
